problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Logistics is overloaded with disconnected systems.
problem.description: Today every company has its own CRM, portal or mobile app. Drivers register in many systems, update statuses in different places and upload documents into separate portals. Dispatchers forget documents, miss statuses and lose hours in WhatsApp, Excel and emails — then penalties and delayed payments follow.

portals.title: Too many customer portals
portals.description: Every client has its own system. Drivers register again and again just to access loads.

status.title: Drivers forget status updates
status.description: Statuses live in WhatsApp, phone calls and separate apps — never in one reliable place.

documents.title: Missing CMR and documents
documents.description: Dispatchers forget uploads. Payments stall when proof of delivery is missing or late.

chat.title: WhatsApp chaos
chat.description: Critical updates disappear in group chats. Nobody knows the latest truth on a load.

excel.title: Excel planning without live status
excel.description: Plans look fine on paper, but the office cannot see what is actually happening on the road.

payment.title: Payment delays and penalties
payment.description: Wrong or late statuses trigger penalties, disputes and delayed settlements.

whyProgo.label: Why ProGo is different
whyProgo.title: Not another portal. One shared operating system.
whyProgo.description: ProGo is not another customer portal or isolated CRM. It is one live platform where carriers, drivers, dispatchers, forwarders and clients work together — without jumping between dozens of systems, WhatsApp groups, Excel files and customer apps.
traditional: Many portals — every client has its own system
WhatsApp chaos — updates lost in group chats
Missing CMR — documents not connected to jobs
Delayed statuses — nobody sees the live truth
progo: One shared map for the whole operation
One live plan connected to real job data
One driver workflow — GPS, status, documents

comparison.label: Compare
comparison.title: ProGo vs WhatsApp, Excel and customer portals
comparison.description: Most logistics teams still patch together group chats, spreadsheets and separate client portals. Here's an honest side-by-side.
comparison.footnote: Based on typical workflows — your setup may vary. ProGo replaces the patchwork with one live platform.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From registration to live operations in four steps.
howItWorks.description: Get your company, fleet and partners connected — then run the full logistics workflow in one system.

1.title: Register your company
1.description: Create your ProGo workspace and set up your logistics operation in minutes.

2.title: Add vehicles, drivers and dispatchers
2.description: Organize your fleet, assign roles and give every team member the right access.

3.title: Connect with carriers, clients or forwarders
3.description: Invite partner companies so everyone works on the same jobs — not separate portals.

4.title: Run jobs, statuses, documents and accounting in one system
4.description: Plan loads, track GPS, update statuses, upload CMR and manage finances — all live.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Quick answers about ProGo, the free trial and how we work with carriers, shippers and producers.

whatIsProgo.a: ProGo is a shared logistics operating system — one live platform for vehicles, loads, GPS, statuses, documents, team chat and accounting. It replaces scattered customer portals, WhatsApp groups and spreadsheets.

whoFor.a: Carriers and fleet owners, dispatchers, drivers, freight clients, producers and forwarders who want one map and one workflow instead of dozens of disconnected tools.

freeTrial.q: How does the 30-day free trial work?
freeTrial.a: You get full platform access for 30 days — vehicles, loads, GPS, statuses, documents and team chat. No commitment. If ProGo is not a fit, you can walk away anytime.

afterTrial.a: If you like ProGo, choose a plan based on the number of users. Pricing is transparent on our website. If not, simply stop — no traps or hidden fees.

difference.q: How is ProGo different from a CRM or customer portal?
difference.a: Portals and CRMs are usually isolated per company. ProGo is one live system where carriers, drivers, dispatchers and clients work together on the same map and data — in real time.

driverApp.q: Is there a mobile app for drivers?
driverApp.a: Yes. Drivers use the ProGo mobile app for statuses, documents, chat and GPS — connected to the same live map your dispatchers see.

pricingModel.a: Plans are based on the number of users. All plans include full ProGo functionality. Discounts are available for 6-month and annual billing.

dataPrivacy.q: How do you handle my data?
dataPrivacy.a: We process contact and account data only to provide the service and respond to inquiries. See our Privacy Policy for details on cookies, retention and your rights.

howToStart.a: Open the platform to start your free month, or contact us through the form below. We typically reply within 24 hours on business days.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — ProGo
meta.description: How ProGo collects, uses and protects personal data on progo.one and the ProGo platform.

intro.title: Overview
paragraphs: ProGo ("we", "us") operates progo.one and the ProGo logistics platform. This policy explains what personal data we collect, why we collect it, and your rights under applicable data protection laws including the GDPR.
By using our website or contacting us, you acknowledge this policy.

dataCollected.title: Data we collect
paragraphs: Website contact form: name, email address, company name (optional), role (optional), message content and browser locale.
Website usage: anonymised analytics via Vercel Analytics (page views, referrers).
Platform accounts: data you provide when using ProGo services is governed by your service agreement.

howWeUse.title: How we use data
paragraphs: To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support.
To send transactional emails related to your contact request.
To improve our website and understand aggregate traffic patterns.
We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

contactForm.title: Contact form & email
paragraphs: When you submit the contact form, your message is sent to our team at admin@progo.one via a secure email delivery service (Resend).
We use your email as Reply-To so we can respond directly to you.

cookies.title: Cookies & analytics
paragraphs: We use Vercel Analytics to measure website traffic. This service may use cookies or similar technologies in anonymised form.
The contact form uses session storage in your browser to avoid counting duplicate page views in our public view counter.

retention.title: Data retention
paragraphs: Contact form submissions are retained as long as needed to handle your inquiry and for legitimate business records, typically up to 24 months unless a longer period is required by law.
You may request deletion of your contact data at any time.

rights.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, delete or restrict processing of your personal data, and to object or withdraw consent.
To exercise these rights, contact us at admin@progo.one. You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
